name: Firewyrm
rules_text: H:2(x2) A:0 HP:12 L:1 Firewalk. Two attacks. Cast on globe. Creates Firewyrm off the board. Before combat, it appears in lava or barren land adjacent to a non-friendly group, and its square becomes lava. After all combat, it disappears again. Dispelled when killed. May be cast more than once. (Lava causes 3 hit points of damage after start of turn unless group has Firewalk.)
